customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of excellent quality, with solid build and smooth installation process. They appreciate its appearance, ease of use, and bundle of features, with one customer highlighting its fingerprint and passcode entry options. The functionality receives mixed feedback - while the lock works as expected, some customers report issues with the fingerprint scanner stopping unexpectedly. Customers consider it good value for money.

reviews.author: Biju Thomas
reviews.title: SubQuality product
reviews.body: The coating on the handle chipped off in 10 months. When customer service was contacted, they insisted that this does not come under wanrrety and payment is required for rectifying the problem. The warranty is supposed to be 2 years but did not get any help for my problem. The door looks very shabby because of the the chipped door handle.

reviews.author: Kanraj Jain
reviews.title: Good Features, but Fingerprint Sensitivity Needs Improvement
reviews.body: The Qubo Smart Lock offers great functionality overall—keyless entry works seamlessly, and the mobile app integration is smooth. Installation was fairly straightforward, and the build quality feels solid and premium. However, one major drawback I faced was while trying to register fingerprints. It consistently failed to recognize or register my wife’s fingerprint, no matter how many times we tried. This could be a serious limitation for elderly users or those with faint fingerprint patterns. Pros: • Sleek design and good build quality • Easy to install • Convenient keyless entry with multiple

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Customer service support of QUBO compared to Customer service support of Amazon
reviews.body: QUBO – LOCKS QUBO Smart Door Lock Ultra from Hero Group | 6-Way Unlocking | Fingerprint | PIN | RFID Access Card | Bluetooth Mobile App | Mechanical Key | OTP Access | 2 Years Brand Warranty | (Copper) I had purchased this lock from amazon and it was received on 25/9/24 As Navaratri was fast coming wanted to install the same at the earliest. The service technician never arrives till 2/10 and then informs that due to space issue cannot install The lock. Was very worried. reviews.author: Durga Srinivas
reviews.title: Amazing Lock
reviews.body: The Qubo Smart Lock Ultra is an impressive device, offering excellent security features combined with modern technology. Its seamless integration with smartphones makes remote access and monitoring incredibly convenient. The fingerprint and passcode entry options provide versatility, and the auto-locking feature enhances safety. Installation is straightforward, and the lock's sleek design adds a stylish touch to any door. Overall, it's a reliable, smart choice for anyone looking to upgrade home security with ease.
